dialog.stepLabel: Maji: "Phew... Thanks for your timely aid...."

items.speaker: Maji
items.text: Phew... Thanks for your timely aid.

items.speaker: Maji
items.text: Hmph, I didn't expect a robbery to happen right after launching the campaign... I'm counting on you today, as always.

items.speaker: Maji
items.text: The items on the list are... jewelry and perfume. But why is this package so heavy? Don't tell me the jewelry is weighed by the kilo, not the carat?

options.text: Worth a great fortune, I guess.

items.speaker: Maji
items.text: Anyway, we need to be extra careful when delivering them, {PlayerName}!

options.text: Such "jewelry" and "perfume" should be handled carefully...
